description: Pull Request review summary from the pr-auto-reviewer orchestration. Aggregates findings from multiple expert reviewers (.NET, Principal Engineer, Security, Durable Tasks) with PR metadata, categorized comments, per-comment metadata (reviewer name, file, severity, draft ID), inline code diffs, and per-comment approve/delete actions. Includes entry-level actions for opening the PR, bulk approve/submit/delete, and voting.

contentTemplate.label: Pull Request
contentTemplate.description: PR metadata. Expected keys: Repository, Branch (source -> target), Author, Files Changed, Lines (+added / -removed).

contentTemplate.label: Review Summary
contentTemplate.description: One row per reviewer agent. Expected columns: Reviewer, Status, Comments, Critical Issues.

contentTemplate.title: Review Comments
contentTemplate.description: Each nested section represents a single review comment with metadata, the comment body, an optional code diff, and per-comment actions.

contentTemplate.label: Details
contentTemplate.description: Comment metadata. Expected keys: Reviewer (agent name, e.g. '.NET Expert'), File (relative path), Lines (line range), Severity (nit/suggestion/bug/critical), Draft ID (PowerReview draft UUID for action commands).

contentTemplate.label: Code
contentTemplate.description: The relevant code snippet or diff for this comment. Use language 'diff' for unified diffs, or the file's language for code snippets. Set 'filename' to the file path and 'highlight' to the relevant line numbers.

expectedActions.label: Approve
expectedActions.description: Approve this draft comment. CLI: powerreview comment approve --pr-url <url> --draft-id <id>

expectedActions.label: Delete
expectedActions.description: Delete this draft comment. CLI: powerreview comment delete --pr-url <url> --draft-id <id>

contentTemplate.label: View PR
contentTemplate.description: Link to the pull request on Azure DevOps or GitHub.

expectedActions.label: Open PR
expectedActions.description: Open the pull request in the browser.

expectedActions.label: Approve All
expectedActions.description: Approve all draft comments. CLI: powerreview comment approve-all --pr-url <url>

expectedActions.label: Submit Review
expectedActions.description: Submit all pending (approved) comments to the remote provider. CLI: powerreview submit --pr-url <url>

expectedActions.label: Approve PR
expectedActions.description: Cast an 'Approved' vote on the PR. CLI: powerreview vote --pr-url <url> --value approve

expectedActions.label: Wait for Author
expectedActions.description: Cast a 'Wait for Author' vote on the PR. CLI: powerreview vote --pr-url <url> --value wait-for-author

expectedActions.label: Delete All
expectedActions.description: Delete all AI-authored draft comments. Removes all drafts without submitting.
